title: trifolium andersonii subsp. monoense
intro: Trifolium andersonii subsp. monoense, also known as Mono clover, is a sub-species of the Trifolium andersonii plant, a type of clover native to the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Mono clover include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Mono clover typically involve drying the leaves and flowers, then using them in teas, infusions, or as a tincture to harness its medicinal properties.
